description:
To properly set the permissions of /etc/issue.net, run the command: 
$ sudo chmod 0644 /etc/issue.net
rationale:
Display of a standardized and approved use notification before granting access to the operating system ensures privacy and security notification verbiage used is consistent with applicable federal laws, Executive Orders, directives, policies, regulations, standards, and guidance.
Proper permissions will ensure that only root user can modify the banner.
ocil:
To check the permissions of /etc/issue.net, run the command: 
$ ls -l /etc/issue.net
If properly configured, the output should indicate the following permissions: -rw-r--r--
title: Verify permissions on System Login Banner for Remote Connections
